name: When
intro: Transfer to a bowl, add the oil and salt, and use a whisk or hand mixer to beat the mixture for 2-3 minutes to incorporate some air into it.

ingredients.item: honey beans or black eyed beans (soaked overnight)

method: Place the beans and water in a food blender and blend until you have a very smooth, thick puree.
Transfer to a bowl, add the oil and salt, and use a whisk or hand mixer to beat the mixture for 2-3 minutes to incorporate some air into it.
